cash_in_desc: Send money from Bangladesh to get VND in your wallet.
approve_deposit_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to approve this deposit? The amount will be added to the user's wallet.
reject_deposit_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reject this deposit? You can specify a reason in the system logs.
p2p_transfer_failed: Transfer failed. Please check balance and receiver details.
invalid_user: User not found or invalid ID
welcomeMsg: Your global wallet is active and ready. Track, send, and manage your money securely.
securityTip: Enable two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security.
noTransactions: No transactions yet. Start by adding money!
hero_title: Send Money from Vietnam to the World.
hero_subtitle: Experience the future of fintech. Secure, instant, and low-fee transfers from Vietnam to India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, and beyond.
all_rights_reserved: All rights reserved. Licensed by SBV.
confirm_action: Are you sure you want to proceed?
global_sync_desc: Rates are updated globally across all user dashboards and calculators instantly upon saving.
select_conversation_desc: Choose a user from the sidebar to start chatting. You can reply to their queries and provide support in real-time.
no_disputes_desc: There are no active disputes or reports in the system.
select_document_error: Please select a document to upload
kyc_verified_desc: Your identity has been successfully verified. You have full access to all features.
kyc_pending_desc: Our team is currently reviewing your documents. This usually takes 24-48 hours.
kyc_none_desc: To increase your transfer limits and unlock all features, please upload a valid government-issued ID.
kyc_upload_placeholder: Click to upload ID Card or Passport
settings_desc: Manage your account preferences and security settings.
payment_methods_desc: Manage your linked bank accounts and cards
two_factor_auth_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
device_management_desc: Manage devices where you are currently logged in
push_notifications_desc: Receive alerts for transfers and account activity
appearance_desc: Switch between light and dark mode
withdrawal_processed: Your withdrawal of ₫500,000 has been processed.
security_alert_desc: New login detected from a new device in Hanoi.
system_update_desc: Tuktak Exchange will be under maintenance for 2 hours tonight.
deposit_received_desc: You have received ₫1,000,000 from Bank Transfer.
admin_hello: Hello! How can I help you today?
user_question: I have a question about my last transfer.
admin_provide_id: Sure, please provide the transaction ID.
firebase_disabled_msg: Email/Password registration is disabled in Firebase. Please enable it in the Firebase Console (Authentication > Sign-in method).
registration_disabled: Registration disabled. See instructions on screen.
google_signin_failed: Failed to sign in with Google
email_already_in_use: This email is already registered. Please login instead.
exchange_rates_desc: Real-time currency market data and historical trends.
live_rates_desc: Real-time mid-market rates for global currencies.
no_rates_found_desc: Try searching for a different currency pair.
recharge_desc: Top up any mobile number in Bangladesh or Vietnam instantly.
recharge_info_desc: Mobile recharges are processed instantly. Please ensure the phone number and operator are correct.
access_denied_admin: Access denied. You are not an admin.
enter_admin_email_first: Please enter your admin email first
password_reset_sent: Password reset link sent to your email
manual_balance_update_warning: Manual balance updates are logged and irreversible. Please verify the amount.
approve_deposit_confirm: Are you sure you want to approve this deposit?
reject_deposit_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this deposit?
user_created_auth_note: User profile created. (Note: Auth account must be created separately in this demo)
reject_withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this withdrawal?
reject_recharge_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this recharge?
trust_message: Have faith in Allah. Your hard-earned money will surely reach your account. Stay connected with us — no one will be cheated, inshallah.
hero_subtitle_landing: Your hard-earned savings are now easy, fast, and completely secure to send to Bangladesh, India, Nepal, and Pakistan.
feature_secure_desc: We use advanced encryption methods to keep your data and money safe.
feature_fast_desc: Money will reach the recipient's account within minutes, inshallah.
feature_global_desc: Sending money to Bangladesh, India, Pakistan, and Nepal is easier than ever.
footer_desc: The most trusted way to send money from Vietnam to South Asia.
honesty_motto: Have faith in Allah. Honesty is our main capital.
activity_5: New exchange rates have been updated
delete_rate_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rate?
approve_deposit_confirm: Are you sure you want to approve this deposit?
reject_deposit_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this deposit?
reject_withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this withdrawal?
user_created_auth_note: User profile created. (Note: Auth account must be created separately in this demo)
delete_rate_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this currency rate? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_payment_msg: Have you confirmed the bank transfer to the user's account? Only proceed if you have manually sent the funds.
reject_withdraw_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reject this withdrawal request? The balance will be refunded to the user's wallet.
complete_recharge_msg: Confirm that the mobile recharge has been successfully processed for the user's phone number.
reject_recharge_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reject this recharge request? The balance will be refunded to the user's wallet.
confirm_profile_update_msg: Are you sure you want to update your profile information?
pending_desc: Admin is reviewing your request... Please stay on this page.
accepted_desc: The admin has received your request. Now 15-20 minutes in your account money arrives. Please wait.
paid_desc: Payment has been sent! Please check your account now and confirm.
completed_desc: Your transaction has been processed and completed successfully!
disputed_desc: You have filed an appeal for this transaction. Our team is investigating.
cancelled_desc: This request has been cancelled and the amount has been refunded to your wallet.
action_required_desc: Please check your account for the incoming transfer and confirm within 5 minutes.
auto_complete_warning: Warning: Order will automatically complete in {{time}} if not confirmed.
no_messages_persisted: All messages are saved securely and will not be deleted.
admin_confirmed_recharge: Admin has confirmed your recharge for {{phone}}. Please verify if your balance has been updated.
admin_sent_money: Admin has sent {{amount}} {{currency}} to your account. Please check your bank and confirm receipt. Once you confirm, the transaction will be completed.
check_bank_for_amount: Please check your {{bank}} account for {{amount}} {{currency}}. Once you confirm receipt, the equivalent amount will be deducted from your wallet.
need_help_desc: If you have any issues with this transaction, please contact our 24/7 support team.
cancel_request_confirm: Are you sure? This will delete your request.
admin_sent_money_desc: Please check your bank account and confirm receipt.
two_factor_auth_active: Two Factor Authentication is now active
